issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Filtered semantic product search with quality threshold
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows Qdrant supports filters with vector search but misses the must/should structure with range and match shapes plus the score_threshold parameter; treatment uses the documented filter.must with range lte / match value plus score_threshold and with_payload.

scenarios.name: Positive/negative recommendation API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for averaging embeddings or repeated similarity searches and overlooks Qdrant's dedicated recommend endpoint; treatment uses client.recommend with positive and negative point IDs plus filter.must, matching the documented API exactly.
